mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue FROM schedule s JOIN performance p ON s.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE s.performance_id = #{performanceId} ORDER BY s.show_date, s.show_time

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM performance
WHERE approval_status = #{approvalStatus}
mapper.update: UPDATE performance SET approval_status = 'PUBLISHED', status = 'ON_SALE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND ticket_open_at IS NOT NULL AND ticket_open_at <= NOW()
UPDATE performance SET status = 'ENDED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status IN ('ON_SALE', 'UPCOMING') AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND end_date < CURDATE()

UPDATE performance SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, approval_note = #{approvalNote}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{reviewedBy} IS NOT NULL THEN NOW() ELSE reviewed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE performance_id = #{performanceId}
